productDisplayName: Indian Terrain Men Rico Navy Blue T-shirt
description: "Mail By Aniket Keshi & Syed, on 25 April 2012" Composition Navy blue pique polo neck t-shirt with blue, red and yellow stripes, made of 100% cotton, has a twill collar, short sleeves with ribbed hems, buttoned chest placket with stitch reinforcement, vented hem and embroidered brand logo Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Hand wash or machine wash cold using mild detergent Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Stripes that add immense style to your casual look is what indian terrain brings into your life with its Pier 17 collection. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish Rico t-shirt, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The ribbed sleeve hems sit snug on well toned arms, and the vented hem offers a comfortable Fit around the waist. Pair it with denims or corduroys and Sports or suede shoes, or even floaters to look like the king of casual wear.
